calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-04-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am

Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Vinicio DeLeon present in pro per. Respondent, Victor Contreras present in pro per (from CSM-11-836928 heard concurrently). Respondent Manuel Contreras present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles.

Exhibits retained in CSM-11-836928.

9:51AM
Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Judgment Entered
